news.paragraph: Semiconductor ETF SMH is seeing mixed signals ahead of Nvidia's earnings, with Dow Jones futures indicating a potential pullback despite Nvidia's strong results. The options market has also flashed warnings regarding Nvidia's upcoming earnings report, suggesting potential volatility. Traders should monitor Nvidia's reaction closely as it heavily influences the semiconductor sector.

headlines.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall After Strong Nvidia Earnings; SpaceX Files For Huge IPO
The options market is flashing an ominous sign about Nvidia’s looming earnings

examples.body: $NVDA Earnings Out Selling Off After Big RallyH&S<216 to $191 $SMH $INTC $QQQ $SPY
